creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At a glance: nothing matching at <https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+sort%3Aupdated-desc>. 

Which version of FreeBSD, exactly?

uname -aKU

Packages from latest, or quarterly? 

pkg -vv | grep -e url -e enabled -e priority

Also, please: 

pkg info -x mesa

pkg query -x '%n %v' 'drm.*kmod'

– and, as an attachment: 

pciconf -lv
